package repository

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for stable_value_normalization_in_inner_loop: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Stable value normalization (ToLower, TrimSpace, etc.) repeated inside inner loops.
type CaseStableValueNormalizationInInnerLoopDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseStableValueNormalizationInInnerLoopModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseStableValueNormalizationInInnerLoopRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseStableValueNormalizationInInnerLoopModel
}

type CaseStableValueNormalizationInInnerLoopService struct {
    repo *CaseStableValueNormalizationInInnerLoopRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseStableValueNormalizationInInnerLoopAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeStableValueNormalizationInInnerLoop(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseStableValueNormalizationInInnerLoopDTO) error {
    focus := "stable_value_normalization_in_inner"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    normalized := strings.ToLower(input)
    for _, item := range items { _ = normalized; _ = item.ID }
    stable_value_normalization_inner_loop_negative := map[string]int{"stable": 1, "value": 2, "normalization": 3, "inner": 4, "loop": 5}
    stable_value_normalization_inner_loop_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    stable_negative_0 := stable_value_normalization_inner_loop_negative["stable"] + len(input)
    _ = stable_negative_0
    value_negative_1 := stable_value_normalization_inner_loop_negative["value"] + len(input)
    _ = value_negative_1
    normalization_negative_2 := stable_value_normalization_inner_loop_negative["normalization"] + len(input)
    _ = normalization_negative_2
    inner_negative_3 := stable_value_normalization_inner_loop_negative["inner"] + len(input)
    _ = inner_negative_3
    for loop_negative_4Index, item := range items { stable_value_normalization_inner_loop_negative[item.ID] = loop_negative_4Index }
    return nil
}
